prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade: Harrop HTV2300 TVS supercharger kit (engine code: AJ-V8 Gen III 5.0L SC, 510hp stock) with custom pulley reduction to 3.25" (10-12psi boost), paired with a PWR intercooler core (4.5" thick, 11-row) and Injector Dynamics ID1700x fuel injectors for 700whp capability on E85 blend

Drivetrain reinforcement: Quaife ATB differential (part #QDF15Y) for the rear axle with 3.73:1 ratio, mated to a ZF 8HP75 transmission valve body recalibration by Dimsport (Stage 3 tune) for 0.15s faster shifts, and a South Bend Clutch dual-disc setup (organic/carbon hybrid) for the transfer case input shaft

Suspension overhaul: Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers (Land Rover-specific valving, 2.5" lift with 30-way damping adjustability) paired with Eibach Pro-Truck 2.0 springs (progressive rate, 800lb/in front, 600lb/in rear), and a TeraFlex heavy-duty anti-roll bar kit (28mm front, 25mm rear) with spherical bearings for articulation retention
estetica: Widebody conversion: Overland Overkill fender flares (bolt-on, 3.5" extended, heat-formed ABS) with custom LED turn signal integration (Lux H8 V4 bulbs), paired with a set of Method MR701 wheels (18x9 +30 offset, beadlock-ready) wrapped in 35x12.50R18 Nitto Ridge Grappler tires

Front-end aggression: Seibon carbon fiber hood (OEM-spec replacement, 30% weight reduction) with a custom heat extractor duct (3D-printed PETG, 4" outlet) feeding the Harrop supercharger, and a Rigid Industries E-Series Pro grille (blacked-out mesh, 50" light bar cutout) with a custom Land Rover heritage badge overlay (laser-etched aluminum)

Off-road lighting: Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED pods (SAE-compliant, 4,400 lumen each) mounted to a custom front bumper (ARB Summit bumper with integrated Warn Zeon 12-S winch and synthetic rope), paired with a set of Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED side markers (amber, sequential) and a rear Rock Lights RGB underglow kit (10,000 lumen, IP68-rated)
